_comment: Sprint manifest — read by regression.py R27. Set status to IN_PROGRESS when implementation starts. Archive to docs/sprint_archive/ on close.
goal: Wire Claude Code hook infrastructure: compliance_check.py + 3 hooks (pre_commit, pre_push, post_edit). Fix R27 schema bug. Pre-authorize hook permissions.

file_change_log.change: Fix R27 schema bugs: target_file field + must_contain list iteration
Pre-authorize Write(.claude/hooks/*) + chmod; then add full hooks block (2 commits)

file_change_log.no_doc_update_reason: permission migration only — no new behaviour

file_change_log.change: New file — 8-check compliance script extracted verbatim from CLAUDE.md inline block
New file — PreToolUse regression gate on git commit (exit 2 blocks); run_state.json dedup on PASS
New file — PreToolUse compliance gate on git push (exit 2 blocks); calls compliance_check.py
New file — PostToolUse doc audit on Write|Edit of *.md; suppressOutput on clean pass
Replace inline compliance script in Run Commands with python3 compliance_check.py; add to File Structure; update Current State to v5.34.1

notes: v5.34.1 is the first of two micro-sprints split from the original single hooks sprint to stay under Rule 5 (9-item limit).
v5.34.2 (session_016) handles: R28 checks, baseline count updates, version.py, QA brief, sprint board, sprint close.
BLOCKER resolved in first commit: R27 reads 'file' key for checks but manifest uses 'target_file'; must_contain is list not string.
Manifest stays PLANNED until R27 fix is committed and verified — then set to IN_PROGRESS.
All hook scripts use $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR for portability. stdin parsed with Python (jq not installed).
compliance_check.py: extract VERBATIM — Rules 11-14 depend on exact string matching and lookbehind regex.
